author: doll-agent
content: Added GraphicalLasso + GraphicalLassoCV (coordinate-descent solver per Friedman/Hastie/Tibshirani 2008) and 7 function-style helpers: empirical_covariance, shrunk_covariance, ledoit_wolf, ledoit_wolf_shrinkage, oas, log_likelihood (with adaptive Cholesky regularization for near-SPD matrices), fast_mcd. All wired in lib.rs. 53 lib + 5 api_proof tests pass.
